title: Scene Complication
note: An edge to hang on a Turning Point or a 'success at a cost'. Prefer one that presses a PC's Bond or Theme.

entries.value: A hidden traitor or double agent is revealed
The clock is worse than it looked — advance a threat Clock
An innocent is caught in the middle
A rival party wants the same prize
The environment turns hostile — collapse, storm, flood
A Bond is threatened or leveraged against a PC
A resource fails — out of MP/IP, or a key tool breaks
The truth is not what they were told
A Villain makes an entrance — each PC gains 1 Fabula Point
